title: Hangerworld 3 Pack of Wooden Trouser Hangers - Multifunctional 4 Tier Clothes Storage Organiser with Non Slip Bars
features: Pack of 3 quality wooden 4 tier trouser bar coat hangers.
Strong design. Size: 15 in (W) x 13.5 in (H) (38 x 35cm).
Space-saving versatile hanging for 4 pairs of trousers per hanger.
Metal side hinges allow angling of hanger body for easy access & removal of trousers.
Ideal gift for Christmas or birthday. Trusted Hangerworld brand.
description: Natural wooden multi trouser hangers space saving design - hang 4 pairs of trousers or jeans on one hanger. Strong design made from wood with metal pivoting side hinge which allows easy loading and for the trouser hanger to hang straight in your wardrobe. Non slip grip on each bar prevents your trousers from falling to the floor, keeping your wardrobe tidy and organised. Slim profile means you and fit more on your rail, excellent space saver. This 4 tier multifunctional pants rack hanger could also be useful for towels, skirts, scarves and accessories, a great multi-purpose hanger for home storage. Supplied by Hangerworld, a trusted British brand and expert in clothing care - high quality guaranteed.
